items.label: 539f6ae9ec4f024411ec95c3
items.description:
This tariff is applicable to any retail customer (a) for which the Company is providing bundled electric
service; and (b) to which the Competitively Declared Customer Group, as defined in the Supply Groups
section of the Retail Customer Categorizations part of the General Terms and Conditions of the
Company's Schedule of Rates, is applicable, or would be applicable based upon the Company's judgment
with respect to such retail customer's expected electric power and energy requirements.

Basic Electric Service Hourly Pricing charges which charges every hour is added to this rate for the full $/kwh charge.
items.name: BESH- Residential Single Family Without Electric Space Heat Delivery Class(Unbundled)

items.label: 539f6b06ec4f024411ec971d
items.description:

ategorizations part of the General Terms and Conditions of the

items.label: 539f6b07ec4f024411ec9779
items.description:
This tariff is applicable to any retail customer (a) for which the Company is providing bundled electric
service; and (b) to which the Competitively Declared Customer Group, as defined in the Supply Groups
section of the Retail Customer Categorizations part of the General Terms and Conditions of the
Company's Schedule of Rates, is applicable, or would be applicable based upon the Company's judgment
with respect to such retail customer's expected electric power and energy requirements

**Basic Electric Service Hourly Pricing charges which charges every hour is added to the energy charge for the full $/kwh charge.
items.name: BESH- Residential Multi Family With Electric Space Heat Delivery Class(Unbundled)

items.label: 539f6f42ec4f024411eccbf7
items.name: BES - Residential Single Family with Electric Space Heating
items.description:
* Rider PE (summer & non-summer): https://www.comed.com/Documents/customer-service/rates-pricing/rates-information/current/PurchasedElectricityCharges.pdf

* Rate Information: https://www.comed.com/Documents/customer-service/rates-pricing/rates-information/current/PurchasedElectricityCharges.pdf

and 

Rate has added to it: Distribution Facilities Charge + Illinois Electricity Distribution charge: https://www.comed.com/Documents/customer-service/rates-pricing/rates-information/current/Delivery_Service_Charges_InfoSheets.pdf

*Adjustments =  PJM service charge, Hourly Purchased Electricity
Adjustment Factors, Purchased Electricity Adjustment Factors: https://www.comed.com/Documents/customer-service/rates-pricing/rates-information/current/PJMServicesChargesFixed.pdf and https://www.comed.com/Documents/customer-service/rates-pricing/rates-information/current/PEArecordforratebook.pdf

* Fixed Monthly Charge: https://www.comed.com/Documents/customer-service/rates-pricing/rates-information/current/Delivery_Service_Charges_InfoSheets.pdf

* Monthly Charge needs to be calculated with Incremental Distribution uncollectible cost factor (IDUF) supplemental to rate DSPP
